titleStmt.title: SII 17.306: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 306. (A.R. No. 277 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This records a gift of cows and sheep by Mummuḍi-chōḻan alias Mīnavaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ, the perundanam officer of the king, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva. The cows and sheep were entrusted to the care of a shepherd Śāṇaṉ Pottal of Veṇkal alias Satyāśrayakulakālapuram in Paiyyūr-Iḷaṅgōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara virunilamaṭantaiyum porcayappāvaiyuñ cirttanic celviyun=ta
ṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutinilūḻiyil Iṭaituṟai nāṭuntuṭarvanavelip paṭarvā
navāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇa
ṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamu [porukaṭaliḻattaṟaiyar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar te]
viya(r) roṅkeḻilmuṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉnavar vaitta cun=tara
muṭiyum In=tira(ṉ)nāramum teṇṭirai yīḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu Eṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyi
ṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum �
ruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinavilorupa
melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti
caṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaḷaipperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiya Iraṭṭa
pāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap peru malaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamum
mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷai nāmaṇaik koṇayum veñ
cilai vīrar pañcap paḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻana mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvilvaṇ kirtti yātinakaṟa
vaiyuḷ can=tiraṉṟolkulat tin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉatto
ṭu niṟaikulat taṉakkukaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñceṟiviḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurar[*] cer naṟcocalaināṭum
taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuka tākki tikkaṇa
kirtti takkaṇa lāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅ
kuvoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāra
mum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal na
ṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅ[kirāma vijaiyottuṅka panma]nākiya Iṭārattarai
yoṭu makappaṭuttu
Ārttava nakar por �
viccātira toraṇamum poyttoḷipuṉa maṇipputavamum kaṉa
maṇikkatavamum niṟai cīr vijaiyamum tuṟai nīr paṉṉaiyum varumalai
ṟṟon malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā
valviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟai punal māpappāḷamum kāvala
[ṉ puricai mevili paṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai] viḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talai takko
lamum titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum [ k(ā)lā mutir kaṭun=tiṟal] nilāmuritecamum tenakkala(r)p poḻil māṉa
kkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumu ṟaṭkaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāna śrīrā
jen=tiracoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
ṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭut tirukkaraḷatti mahādevaṟku nāṭṭu tirukkā
śrīrājen=tira coḻa tevar perun=ta
mummuṭi coḻaṉnāna mīnavaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ
ṉāl Ittevar citāratte viṭṭa cāvāmuvāp perāṭu
paṇṭārattey nicatam Uḻakku neyyaṭṭi [ Oru tirunan=tāviḷakku] can=tirātittavaṟ celuttuvo mā
ṉom Ittevar tevakanmikaḷom Itu panmāyeśvara rakṣai Ivviḷakkukkup pacu muppa
paiyūriḷaṅ koṭṭattu veṇkalañ cattiyāḻrayakulakālapurattu
cāṇaṉ pottal vacam Aṭuttukkuṭuttu cūla ney can=tirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭa
ricu Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Ittevarkanmikaḷom .
Digital edition of SII 17.306 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
